consistency.mechanics_flow: Logical progression: activation, summoning effects (damage/push), structure details, and dismissal conditions.

quality.clarity: High. The description is detailed regarding dimensions, features (slits, door, ladder), and activation/deactivation.
quality.completeness: Good. Covers creation, structure, defenses (HP, resistance, immunity), and destruction/repair.

mechanics.activation: Action to place/speak command word; Bonus Action to open door.

effects_on_creation.displacement: Pushed to an adjacent unoccupied space (applies to creatures and unsecured objects).

features: Two interior floors connected by a ladder

limitations.door_bypass: Immune to *knock* spell and similar opening magic.
limitations.repair: Only *wish* spell can repair, counts as replicating an 8th-level spell; each *wish* restores 50 HP to one component (roof, door, or wall).

mechanics.dismissal: Action required, only works if the fortress is empty.
